---
title: "Quarto Tutorial: Create a Presentation and Publish it on GitHub Pages"
author: "Haje Mohammed"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: simple
    slide-number: true
    transition: fade
    center: true
    toc: false
execute: 
  echo: false
---

# Welcome

Learn how to:

- Create a Quarto presentation  
- Preview slides locally  
- Publish your presentation as a live URL using GitHub Pages  

By the end, you will have a presentation online like:

`https://yourusername.github.io/repository-name/`

---

# What You Need

Before starting, install:

1. **Quarto**  
   https://quarto.org/docs/get-started/

2. **Git**  
   https://git-scm.com/

3. **GitHub Account**  
   https://github.com/

4. **VS Code or RStudio** (optional but recommended)

---

# Step 1: Create a New Project Folder

Create a folder for your presentation:

```bash
mkdir my-presentation
cd my-presentation

# Step 2: Create Your Presentation File
Create a file named:
index.qmd

Step 3: Preview Locally
Run this command in terminal:
quarto preview index.qmd
This opens your presentation in the browser.
Any edits you save will automatically refresh.

#Step 4: Customize Slides
You can add themes:
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: dark
You can add slide numbers

#Step 5: Initialize Git
Inside terminal:

#Step 6: Create GitHub Repository
Go to GitHub and create a new repository.
Example name:
my-presentation
Then connect it:
git remote add origin https://github.com/yourusername/my-presentation.git
git branch -M main
git push -u origin main

#Step 7: Publish to GitHub Pages
Run:
quarto publish gh-pages
Quarto will:
Build your presentation
Create gh-pages branch
Publish website

#Step 8: Your Live URL
Your presentation will be available at:
https://yourusername.github.io/my-presentation/
Example:
https://johnsmith.github.io/my-presentation/
Automatic Updates
After first publish:
Whenever you edit slides:
git add .
git commit -m "Update slides"
git push
Then run:
quarto publish gh-pages
Recommended File Structure
my-presentation/
│── index.qmd
│── images/
│   └── photo.png
│── _quarto.yml   (optional)
Bonus: Better Themes
Try these themes:
simple
dark
solarized
moon
serif
Example:
theme: moon

Resources
https://quarto.org
https://github.com
https://pages.github.com
Thank You
Your Quarto presentation is now online
